subjects.name: Database Management System (BCS501)
topics: Introduction: Overview, Database System vs File System, Database System Concept and Architecture
Relational data Model and Language: Relational Data Model Concepts, Integrity Constraints
Data Base Design & Normalization: Functional dependencies, normal forms
Transaction Processing Concept: Transaction System, Testing of Serializability
Concurrency Control Techniques: Concurrency Control, Locking Techniques for Concurrency Control

subjects.name: Web Technology (BCS502)
topics: Introduction: Introduction and Web Development Strategies, History of Web and Internet
CSS: Creating Style Sheet, CSS Properties, CSS Styling
Scripting: Java script: Introduction, documents, forms, statements, functions, objects
Enterprise Java Bean: Creating a JavaBeans, JavaBeans Properties, Types of beans
Servlets: Servlet Overview and Architecture, Interface Servlet and the Servlet Life Cycle

subjects.name: Design and Analysis of Algorithm (BCS503)
topics: Introduction: Algorithms, Analyzing Algorithms, Complexity of Algorithms
Techniques for Designing Algorithms: Recursion, Divide-and-Conquer, Greedy
Sorting and Searching: Classical Sorting, Searching, Optimization and Graph Algorithms
Graph Algorithms: Graph Traversal, Shortest Path, Minimum Spanning Tree
Advanced Topics: Dynamic Programming, NP-Complete Problems

subjects.name: Software Engineering (BCS601)
topics: Introduction to Software Engineering: Software Engineering Principles, Software Development Life Cycle
Software Requirements: Requirements Gathering, Requirements Specification
Software Design: Design Principles, Design Patterns, User Interface Design
Software Implementation: Programming Languages, Coding Standards, Testing
Software Testing and Maintenance: Testing Types, Testing Techniques, Maintenance

subjects.name: Compiler Design (BCS602)
topics: Introduction to Compiler Design: Compiler Overview, Compiler Structure
Lexical Analysis: Tokenization, Regular Expressions, Finite Automata
Syntax Analysis: Context-Free Grammars, Parsing Techniques, Top-Down and Bottom-Up Parsing
Semantic Analysis: Attribute Grammars, Semantic Actions, Type Checking
Intermediate Code Generation: Three-Address Code, Quadruples, Triples

subjects.name: Computer Networks (BCS603)
topics: Introduction to Computer Networks: Network Fundamentals, Network Types
Network Layer: IP Addressing, Routing, Congestion Control
Transport Layer: TCP, UDP, Sockets
Application Layer: HTTP, FTP, SMTP, DNS
Network Security: Security Threats, Security Measures, Firewalls, VPNs
